topics.display_name: Which Hogwarts House do you belong to?

synopsis.title: The Ultimate Sorting Hat Quiz: Which Hogwarts House Truly Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Step into the Great Hall and let the Sorting Hat peer into your deepest traits. Are you defined by your bravery, your wit, your loyalty, or your ambition? This quiz goes beyond the surface to find where you truly belong in the wizarding world.

characters.name: Gryffindor
characters.short_description: You are defined by your daring spirit, chivalry, and the courage to stand up for what is right even when facing great personal risk.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a fiery heart and a natural inclination toward bravery that sets you apart from the crowd. Whether you are defending a friend or tackling a daunting challenge, you lead with your instincts and a strong sense of justice. You value nerve and gallantry, often finding yourself at the center of the action because you cannot stand to remain idle when a situation demands a hero. Your strength lies in your unwavering loyalty to your principles and your ability to inspire others through your bold actions.

However, your passion can sometimes border on recklessness or a short temper. You might rush into situations without a fully formed plan, relying on your quick wits and physical prowess to see you through. While your competitive nature drives you to excel, learning to balance your impulsivity with a bit of patience will help you navigate the complexities of life more effectively. You are a true lion at heart, always ready to roar for the causes you believe in.

characters.name: Hufflepuff
characters.short_description: You are characterized by your unwavering dedication, strong work ethic, and a deep-seated belief in fairness and kindness toward all.
characters.profile_text:
You are the backbone of any community, valued for your reliability and your genuine, down-to-earth nature. You believe that hard work is its own reward and that everyone deserves to be treated with respect and equality. Your patience is legendary, and you often serve as the peacemaker in your social circles, preferring harmony over conflict. You do not seek glory for yourself; instead, you find fulfillment in the steady progress of a job well done and the quiet comfort of lasting friendships.

Your greatest strength is your inclusivity and your refusal to judge others based on superficial traits. However, your desire to be helpful can sometimes lead you to neglect your own needs or allow others to take advantage of your good nature. You might struggle with being overly modest or hesitant to voice your own ambitions. By remembering that your contributions are vital and that your voice deserves to be heard, you can continue to be the dependable, compassionate force that makes the world a better place.

characters.name: Ravenclaw
characters.short_description: You prize intelligence, creativity, and a sharp wit, constantly seeking to expand your understanding of the world through curiosity and logic.
characters.profile_text:
You have an insatiable thirst for knowledge and a mind that is always searching for the why behind the what. You value originality and are often drawn to unconventional ideas or complex puzzles that others might find daunting. Your analytical skills allow you to see patterns and solutions that escape the average observer, making you a brilliant strategist and a source of wisdom for those around you. You take pride in your intellectual independence and your ability to think critically about any subject.

While your cleverness is your greatest asset, it can occasionally lead to a sense of detachment or intellectual pride. You might find yourself becoming so absorbed in your thoughts or academic pursuits that you lose touch with the practical or emotional aspects of a situation. It is important to remember that not every problem can be solved with logic alone and that connection with others is just as valuable as the pursuit of truth. Your unique perspective is a gift that, when shared, can enlighten everyone you encounter.

characters.name: Slytherin
characters.short_description: You are an ambitious and resourceful individual who uses your cunning and leadership skills to achieve your goals and protect your own.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by a desire to succeed and a keen sense of self-preservation that ensures you always come out on top. You are highly strategic, often thinking several steps ahead of your peers to navigate social and professional landscapes with ease. You value tradition and legacy, but you are also adaptable enough to change your tactics when the situation requires it. Your loyalty is fierce but selective; you protect your inner circle with everything you have, making you a powerful ally and a formidable opponent.

Your ambition is a powerful engine, but it can sometimes lead you to prioritize the end result over the means used to get there. You may be perceived as calculating or aloof, as you tend to keep your true intentions close to your chest. Learning to trust others and recognizing the value of cooperation can help you achieve even greater heights without burning bridges. You possess the determination and the vision to leave a lasting mark on the world, provided you use your considerable talents with purpose and foresight.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, daunting obstacle, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: To charge forward and confront it directly, trusting my nerves to see me through.
To step back and analyze the situation logically to find the most efficient solution.
To put in the hard work and steady effort required to gradually overcome it.
To look for a strategic advantage or a clever shortcut that ensures my success.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you value most in a close friend or partner?

options.text: Boldness and the willingness to stand up for what is right.
Intellectual curiosity and a sharp, original wit.
Unwavering loyalty and a commitment to fairness.
Ambition and the resourcefulness to achieve their goals.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, which role do you find yourself naturally assuming?

options.text: The brave leader who takes the initiative and inspires others to act.
The wise advisor who provides critical insights and creative ideas.
The reliable team player who ensures everyone is treated equally and the job gets done.
The shrewd strategist who manages the group's direction to ensure the best outcome.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear when it comes to how others perceive you?

options.text: Being seen as a coward or someone who lacks the nerve to act.
Being seen as ignorant or lacking the mental capacity to understand complex ideas.
Being seen as selfish, unkind, or someone who cannot be depended upon.
Being seen as weak, unsuccessful, or easily manipulated by others.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you discovered a powerful, ancient artifact, what would be your first thought?

options.text: How I can use this to protect those who are in danger.
How I can study this to unlock its secrets and expand my knowledge.
How I can share this with my community to ensure everyone benefits fairly.
How I can use this to advance my own standing and secure my future.

topics.display_name: Which Greek God or Goddess are you?

synopsis.title: Which Olympian Deity Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like your temper is a literal lightning bolt or your love life is a tragic epic? It is time to find out which resident of Mount Olympus is pulling your strings. From the heights of power to the depths of the underworld, your personality matches a legendary Greek god or goddess. Take this quiz to discover your divine counterpart and claim your throne.

characters.name: Zeus
characters.short_description: You are a natural-born leader who commands respect and thrives in positions of ultimate authority.
characters.profile_text: You possess an innate sense of command and a vision that spans the entire horizon. Like the king of the gods, you are driven by a desire for order and the power to enforce it, often finding yourself at the center of any social or professional circle. Your strengths lie in your decisiveness and your ability to see the big picture, making you a formidable ally and a respected mentor to those who follow your lead. Your confidence can sometimes veer into arrogance, and your desire for control may lead to conflicts with those who value their independence. You must be careful not to let your temper flare like a lightning bolt when things do not go your way. Balancing your high expectations with empathy for others will ensure that your reign is as just as it is powerful.

characters.name: Hera
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast protector of tradition and commitment, valuing loyalty and the sanctity of the home above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of your community, a person who understands the profound importance of long-term bonds and the structures that keep society together. Your dedication to your loved ones is unparalleled, and you often take on the role of the guardian, ensuring that everyone stays true to their word and their responsibilities. You find great fulfillment in creating a stable, harmonious environment and are often the first to defend the honor of your family or organization. On the flip side, your intense focus on loyalty can lead to feelings of jealousy or resentment if you perceive a breach of trust. You may find it difficult to forgive those who have wronged you, holding onto grievances long after others have moved on. Learning to channel your protective instincts into constructive support rather than control will help you maintain the very harmony you cherish.

characters.name: Poseidon
characters.short_description: You are a person of deep, turbulent emotions and immense creative power, capable of both great calm and sudden storms.
characters.profile_text: Your personality is as vast and unpredictable as the ocean itself. You are driven by your passions and possess a raw, elemental energy that can inspire those around you or overwhelm them if left unchecked. When you are at peace, you offer a depth of understanding and a steady presence that others find grounding. Yet, when your emotions are stirred, you can be impulsive and fiercely reactive, lashing out with a force that is hard to ignore. You value your freedom and often feel a strong connection to nature and the physical world. Your greatest strength is your authenticity; you never hide how you feel, and your honesty is a breath of fresh air. However, your tendency to hold onto slights can lead to a cycle of moodiness. Finding healthy outlets for your intensity will allow you to harness your power for creation rather than destruction.

characters.name: Hades
characters.short_description: You are a reserved and introspective soul who finds value in the hidden depths of the mind and the quiet mysteries of life.
characters.profile_text: While others seek the spotlight, you are content to dwell in the shadows, focusing on the internal world and the wealth of knowledge found in solitude. You possess a rare kind of integrity and a stoic nature that allows you to handle the most difficult truths without flinching. People often see you as mysterious or distant, but those who earn your trust find a person of immense loyalty and profound wisdom. You are the one who manages the resources others overlook, finding value in what has been discarded or forgotten. Your pitfall lies in your tendency toward isolation, which can sometimes lead to a sense of gloom or a disconnect from the vibrant energy of the world above. By occasionally stepping out of your private realm, you can share your unique insights with others, proving that there is great light to be found even in the deepest places.

characters.name: Athena
characters.short_description: You are a strategic thinker and a lifelong learner who approaches every challenge with logic, wisdom, and a cool head.
characters.profile_text: You thrive in the realm of the intellect, where strategy and reason reign supreme. Unlike those who act on impulse, you prefer to analyze every angle of a situation before making your move, ensuring that your actions are both effective and ethical. You are often the person others turn to for advice, as your ability to remain objective in the heat of the moment is one of your greatest assets. You value craftsmanship, education, and the pursuit of excellence in all its forms, often excelling in fields that require both creativity and discipline. However, your reliance on logic can sometimes make you appear cold or detached to those who are more emotionally driven. You may struggle to understand the messy, irrational side of human nature, viewing it as a problem to be solved rather than an experience to be felt. Integrating a bit of spontaneity into your life will help you connect more deeply with the world around you.

characters.name: Apollo
characters.short_description: You are a multi-talented individual who shines in the arts and sciences, bringing light and clarity to everything you touch.
characters.profile_text: You are a true Renaissance soul, possessing a wide array of talents that range from the creative to the analytical. Whether you are expressing yourself through music, pursuing scientific truths, or simply organizing your life with precision, you do so with a sense of grace and a desire for perfection. You are often seen as a beacon of positivity and intelligence, capable of illuminating complex ideas and making them accessible to others. Your optimism is infectious, and your drive for self-improvement keeps you constantly moving toward new goals. The challenge you face is the pressure you place on yourself to be perfect in every endeavor. This can lead to a fear of failure or a tendency to be overly critical of yourself and others when things fall short of your high standards. Embracing the beauty of imperfection will allow your natural radiance to shine even brighter, without the burden of impossible expectations.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a group is lacking direction, what is your natural response?

options.text: I step up and take command to restore order.
I ensure everyone sticks to the established rules and traditions.
I let my feelings guide me, even if it causes a stir.
I observe from the sidelines and wait for the chaos to pass.
I develop a logical strategy to solve the problem efficiently.
I use my talents to inspire others and bring clarity to the situation.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment makes you feel most at peace?

options.text: A place of high status where I can see everything at once.
A stable, harmonious home filled with loved ones.
The raw, unpredictable beauty of the natural world.
A quiet, secluded space where I can focus on my thoughts.
A library or workshop where I can master new skills.
A bright, creative studio where I can pursue perfection.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a personal disagreement?

options.text: I assert my authority to settle the matter quickly.
I feel deeply hurt by the breach of loyalty and hold my ground.
I react with immediate, intense emotion until the storm breaks.
I withdraw to process the situation in private.
I remain objective and try to find a rational solution.
I look for the truth and try to bring light to the misunderstanding.

baseline_questions.question_text: What quality do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My ability to lead and make difficult decisions.
My unwavering commitment to my family and friends.
My authenticity and the depth of my passions.
My integrity and my ability to handle difficult truths.
My wisdom and my disciplined, strategic mind.
My versatility and my drive for self-improvement.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest challenge when working toward a goal?

options.text: A tendency to become arrogant or overly controlling.
Difficulty letting go of past grievances or slights.
Being swayed by impulsive moods or sudden outbursts.
A habit of isolating myself from the rest of the world.
Appearing cold or detached because I rely too much on logic.
Putting too much pressure on myself to be absolutely perfect.

topics.display_name: Which Star Wars character are you?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Star Wars Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you are more of a farm boy with a destiny or a rogue with a heart of gold? Whether you are guided by the light side of the Force or tempted by the power of the dark, your personality holds the key to your galactic counterpart. Take this quiz to discover which legendary hero or villain from a galaxy far, far away matches your spirit!

characters.name: Luke Skywalker
characters.short_description: You are a hopeful farm boy turned legendary Jedi Knight who believes in the inherent goodness of others.
characters.profile_text: You possess a deep sense of idealism and a restless spirit that often draws you toward a greater purpose beyond your immediate surroundings. While you may start your journey feeling like an underdog, your innate connection to the world around you and your unwavering loyalty to your friends allow you to overcome immense obstacles. You are guided by your heart, which makes you compassionate, but it can also lead to moments of impulsivity or emotional vulnerability when those you love are in danger. Your greatest strength lies in your capacity for forgiveness and your belief that no one is ever truly lost. You are willing to face your darkest fears and confront the shadows within yourself to do what is right. However, you must be careful not to let your attachments cloud your judgment or lead you toward a path of isolation when the weight of the world feels too heavy to bear alone.

characters.name: Han Solo
characters.short_description: You are a charming rogue and skilled pilot who hides a heart of gold beneath a cynical, street-smart exterior.
characters.profile_text: You are a fiercely independent individual who prefers to rely on your wits and your reflexes rather than ancient philosophies or rigid rules. Your life is defined by a sense of adventure and a healthy dose of skepticism, often leading you to prioritize self-preservation and practical solutions. Despite your claims of only looking out for yourself, you possess a deep-seated loyalty to those who earn your trust, and you will risk everything to protect your crew and your ship. You thrive in high-pressure situations where you can improvise and fly by the seat of your pants. Your confidence can sometimes border on arrogance, and your tendency to shoot first might get you into trouble, but your charisma usually helps you talk your way out of it. Underneath the bravado, you are a reliable ally who eventually realizes that some causes are worth fighting for, even if they do not offer an immediate payout.

characters.name: Princess Leia Organa
characters.short_description: You are a fearless leader and diplomat who combines sharp intelligence with an unbreakable will to fight for justice.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural-born leader who commands respect through your competence, courage, and unwavering dedication to your principles. You possess a sharp tongue and an even sharper mind, allowing you to navigate complex political landscapes and battlefield tactics with equal ease. You do not suffer fools gladly and have little patience for those who stand in the way of progress or freedom. Your sense of duty often comes before your personal desires, as you carry the weight of leadership with grace and resilience. While you are known for your toughness and your ability to stay composed under fire, you also harbor a deep capacity for love and empathy. You are the glue that holds your community together, providing hope even in the darkest of times. Your main challenge is learning to balance your immense responsibilities with your own emotional needs, ensuring that your drive for justice does not lead to burnout or emotional distance from those closest to you.

characters.name: Darth Vader
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and imposing figure driven by intense passion, complex emotions, and a formidable presence.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense power and discipline, often characterized by a stern and uncompromising nature. Your life has been shaped by profound loss and the weight of high expectations, leading you to seek order and control in a chaotic universe. You possess a singular focus that allows you to achieve incredible feats, but this intensity can also isolate you from others and lead you down a path of internal conflict. You value strength and efficiency above all else, often finding yourself frustrated by the perceived weaknesses of those around you. Beneath your formidable exterior lies a complex history of passion and pain. You are a tragic figure who has sacrificed much for what you believed was the greater good, only to find yourself trapped by your own choices. Your journey is one of redemption and the struggle to reconcile your past with your present. You must learn that true power comes not from fear or domination, but from the ability to face your own vulnerabilities and choose a path of compassion.

characters.name: Yoda
characters.short_description: You are a wise and patient mentor who values spiritual growth, discipline, and the power of the mind over physical strength.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of great wisdom and longevity, possessing a perspective that spans generations. You understand that true strength is not found in weapons or physical prowess, but in the quiet discipline of the mind and the connection to the universe. You are a patient teacher who prefers to guide others through riddles and reflection rather than direct commands, encouraging them to find their own path. Your calm demeanor and quirky sense of humor often mask the immense power and knowledge you hold. You have seen empires rise and fall, which has taught you the importance of humility and the dangers of pride. You are deeply attuned to the balance of things and can sense shifts in the world that others might miss. However, your commitment to tradition and your long-term view can sometimes make you appear detached or slow to act in the face of immediate crises. Your challenge is to remain engaged with the present while maintaining your connection to the timeless truths you have spent centuries mastering.

characters.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
characters.short_description: You are a principled and stoic guardian who balances traditional values with a dry wit and strategic brilliance.
characters.profile_text: You are the embodiment of duty and honor, a person who remains steadfast in your convictions even when the world around you crumbles. You possess a calm, analytical mind that allows you to assess situations logically and act with precision. Your approach to life is guided by a strict moral code and a deep respect for the lessons of the past. While you are a formidable warrior when necessary, you prefer diplomacy and cleverness to resolve conflicts, often using your words to outmaneuver your opponents. You have a dry, understated sense of humor that serves as a shield against the hardships you have endured. You are a mentor who takes your responsibilities seriously, often putting the needs of your students and the greater good above your own happiness. Your greatest struggle is the burden of guilt you carry for the failures of those you cared for, and the loneliness that comes with being a guardian of a lost era. You must learn to forgive yourself and recognize that you cannot control the choices of others, only your own response to them.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary approach to finding a solution?

options.text: I rely on my intuition and the belief that things will work out if my heart is in the right place.
I improvise on the fly, using my wits and whatever tools are at my immediate disposal.
I analyze the situation strategically and organize a clear plan of action for others to follow.
I seek order and efficiency, applying decisive force or authority to resolve the issue quickly.
I meditate on the deeper meaning of the problem and wait for the right moment to act.
I look to established principles and past experiences to guide my logical decision-making.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your personal emotions during a high-stakes conflict?

options.text: I am openly expressive, often letting my feelings drive my determination.
I use humor and sarcasm as a shield to keep others from seeing how much I care.
I suppress my personal feelings to maintain a professional and commanding presence.
I channel my intense passions and frustrations into a singular, focused power.
I remain completely detached and calm, viewing emotions as passing clouds.
I maintain a stoic exterior, though I feel the weight of my responsibilities deeply.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for helping a cause or a group of people?

options.text: A sincere belief in the inherent goodness of the cause and a desire to help those in need.
Personal loyalty to my friends and the people who have stood by me.
A sense of duty to lead and a commitment to achieving justice for the collective.
A desire to establish order and ensure that systems function correctly under strong leadership.
A commitment to maintaining the natural balance and spiritual health of the world.
An unwavering adherence to a moral code and the preservation of honorable traditions.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your ideal role within a team or community?

options.text: The hopeful newcomer who is eager to learn and grow into a greater destiny.
The independent specialist who works best when given the freedom to operate.
The visionary leader who coordinates efforts and makes the tough calls.
The enforcer who ensures discipline and demands excellence from everyone.
The wise elder who provides perspective and guidance from the sidelines.
The reliable guardian who protects the group and mentors the next generation.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view the concept of 'the past' and its influence on your life?

options.text: It is something to move beyond as I seek a brighter, more meaningful future.
It is a collection of lessons and mistakes that taught me how to survive on my own.
It is a foundation of heritage and responsibility that I must honor through my work.
It is a source of pain and regret that I have tried to bury under a new identity.
It is a vast cycle of history that provides the wisdom needed to understand the present.
It is a sacred set of values and failures that I am duty-bound to remember and protect.

topics.display_name: Which original Avenger are you?

synopsis.title: Which Member Of The OG Avengers Squad Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the leader with a plan or the genius with a snarky comment? It's time to assemble and find out which of the original six heroes matches your personality. From high-tech suits to gamma-ray rage, your choices will reveal your true Marvel identity.

characters.name: Iron Man
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant visionary and charismatic leader who uses your intellect and resources to solve the world's most complex problems.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your restless mind and your constant desire to innovate. You often find yourself several steps ahead of everyone else, which can make you appear arrogant or detached, but your heart is always in the right place. You believe that technology and progress are the keys to a safer future, and you aren't afraid to take massive risks to achieve your goals. Your confidence is your greatest strength, allowing you to lead with flair and handle high-pressure situations with a witty remark. However, your tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to isolation and anxiety.

You struggle with the need for control and sometimes find it difficult to trust others to handle things as well as you do. Learning to balance your ego with humility is your lifelong challenge. Despite your flaws, your loyalty to your friends is unwavering, and you are always willing to make the ultimate sacrifice if it means protecting the people you love. You are a person of action who would rather build a solution than sit around discussing the problem, making you a formidable force for change in any environment.

characters.name: Captain America
characters.short_description: You are a principled and courageous leader whose unwavering moral compass serves as an inspiration to everyone around you.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rare kind of integrity that makes you a natural anchor for those in your life. You believe in doing what is right, regardless of the personal cost or the prevailing winds of public opinion. Your discipline and sense of duty are unmatched, and you often find yourself standing up for the underdog because you remember what it was like to be one. You value tradition, loyalty, and the power of a team working toward a common, noble goal. You are the person others look to when they lose their way, as your conviction provides a steady path forward.

Your greatest pitfall is your rigid idealism, which can sometimes make it hard for you to navigate a world that is increasingly shades of gray. You might struggle to adapt when the rules change or when those you trust fail to live up to your high standards. Nevertheless, your resilience is legendary; you never stay down for long, and your ability to bring out the best in others ensures that you are never truly alone in your battles. You are a symbol of hope and endurance, proving that true strength comes from the heart.

characters.name: Thor
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and noble individual who balances a regal sense of duty with a boisterous, adventurous spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You carry yourself with a natural authority and a zest for life that is truly infectious. Whether you are celebrating a victory or facing a daunting challenge, you do so with immense passion and a sense of grandiosity. You value honor and family above all else, though your relationships can be complicated by your high expectations and your occasionally stubborn nature. You are someone who finds strength in your heritage and takes great pride in your abilities, often approaching life with the confidence of someone who knows they are destined for greatness.

While your physical and mental strength are formidable, your journey is often one of learning humility. You can be prone to impulsiveness and a "might makes right" mentality when your emotions get the better of you. Over time, you have learned that true power comes from wisdom and the willingness to serve others rather than just ruling over them. You are a protector at heart, always ready to weather the storm to keep your world and your friends safe, and you possess a resilience that allows you to find joy even in the darkest of times.

characters.name: Hulk
characters.short_description: You are a deeply intelligent and sensitive soul who grapples with intense internal conflicts and a hidden, raw power.
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by a brilliant mind and a gentle nature, often preferring quiet contemplation and scientific pursuit over conflict. You are highly empathetic and cautious, aware that your emotions have a significant impact on those around you. This self-awareness often leads you to be reserved or even reclusive, as you strive to maintain a sense of peace and order in your life. You value logic and reason, yet you are constantly reminded that there is a more primal, powerful side to your personality that you cannot always ignore.

Your struggle lies in reconciling these two halves of yourself—the intellectual and the emotional. You may fear losing control or being misunderstood by others, which can lead to a sense of loneliness even when you are part of a group. However, when you do embrace your full potential, you are an unstoppable force for good. Your strength is not just in your raw power, but in your capacity to endure and your commitment to using your unique gifts to help others, even when it feels like a heavy burden to carry.

characters.name: Black Widow
characters.short_description: You are a highly skilled, pragmatic, and mysterious individual who excels at navigating complex situations with grace and precision.
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of adaptation, able to blend into any environment and read people with uncanny accuracy. Your past has made you resilient and somewhat guarded, but it has also given you a deep sense of empathy for those who are seeking redemption. You value competence and efficiency, often preferring to work behind the scenes to ensure that everything runs smoothly. You are the one people turn to when they need a clear head and a steady hand in a crisis, as you rarely let your emotions cloud your judgment.

Because you are so used to keeping your cards close to your chest, you may find it difficult to truly open up to others or let your guard down. You often feel the need to prove yourself or make up for past mistakes, which can drive you to take on dangerous tasks alone. However, your growth comes from realizing that you don't have to carry your secrets by yourself. Your loyalty to your chosen family is fierce, and you are willing to go to any lengths to protect the bonds you have worked so hard to build, showing that your strength lies in your connections.

characters.name: Hawkeye
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and observant specialist who relies on your incredible focus and dedication to keep your team on target.
characters.profile_text:
You are often the most relatable member of any group, providing a necessary perspective that keeps everyone else grounded. You don't need flashy powers or high-tech suits to be effective; instead, you rely on your sharp eyes, your discipline, and your ability to see the world from a different angle. You are a devoted friend and family person who values the simple things in life, often acting as the glue that holds a chaotic team together through your quiet reliability and dry wit. You take pride in your craftsmanship and your ability to stay calm under pressure.

Your greatest challenge is the feeling of being overlooked or undervalued because you don't always seek the spotlight. You might struggle with self-doubt when compared to more flamboyant peers, but your contribution is vital because you see the details that others miss. You are a survivor who knows how to make every shot count, and your resilience in the face of overwhelming odds is a testament to your character. You prove that being a hero is about showing up and doing the work, day after day, and protecting those who cannot protect themselves.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex global problem, what is your first instinctual approach?

options.text: Innovate a technological solution that addresses the root cause.
Organize a team and establish a clear, principled plan of action.
Charge forward with passion and rely on your natural strength.
Analyze the data quietly and look for a logical, low-conflict path.
Assess the situation from the shadows and execute a precise strike.
Observe the details others miss and provide steady support.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle high-pressure situations that involve personal stress?

options.text: I use humor and dive deeper into my work to stay distracted.
I lean on my moral compass and refuse to compromise my values.
I express my emotions loudly and seek a grand resolution.
I withdraw into solitude to regain my internal balance.
I keep my feelings guarded and focus entirely on the task at hand.
I focus on the well-being of my loved ones to stay grounded.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself and others?

options.text: Visionary intelligence and the courage to take risks.
Unwavering integrity and a sense of duty.
Honor, legacy, and a boisterous spirit.
Gentleness, empathy, and intellectual depth.
Adaptability, efficiency, and the drive for redemption.
Reliability, focus, and quiet dedication.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal role within a group dynamic?

options.text: The charismatic strategist who provides the resources.
The moral anchor who inspires everyone to do their best.
The powerful protector who leads the charge.
The brilliant specialist who prefers to stay out of the spotlight.
The pragmatic expert who handles the difficult, unseen work.
The observant teammate who keeps the group grounded.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view the concept of personal power or influence?

options.text: As a tool to be engineered and improved for the future.
As a responsibility that must be used for the common good.
As a natural authority that comes with a duty to serve.
As a heavy burden that requires constant self-control.
As a set of skills to be mastered and used with precision.
As a discipline that is earned through hard work and focus.

topics.display_name: Which Justice League member are you?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Justice League Member Matches Your True Personality?
synopsis.summary: Are you a natural-born leader with a heart of gold, or do you prefer to work from the shadows? The Justice League is full of diverse heroes, each bringing a unique set of skills and values to the table. Take this quiz to find out which legendary protector of Earth aligns with your inner strength and moral compass. It's time to discover your inner superhero!

characters.name: Superman
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate symbol of hope and integrity, always striving to do what is right for the greater good.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unwavering moral compass and a deep-seated belief in the inherent goodness of others. As a natural leader, you often find yourself carrying the weight of the world on your shoulders, yet you handle this responsibility with grace and humility. Your strengths lie in your compassion and your ability to inspire those around you to reach their full potential. You prefer harmony over conflict but will never hesitate to stand up against injustice when it matters most. However, your greatest pitfall is your tendency to take on too much alone, sometimes forgetting that even the strongest individuals need support. You might struggle with feelings of isolation or the pressure of living up to an impossible ideal. By learning to trust others as much as they trust you, you can find a balance between your extraordinary capabilities and your need for personal connection.

characters.name: Batman
characters.short_description: You are a master strategist and a driven perfectionist who uses intellect and willpower to overcome any obstacle.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your intense focus and your refusal to accept defeat, no matter how daunting the odds. Your approach to life is analytical and cautious, as you prefer to be prepared for every possible contingency before making a move. You value discipline and self-reliance above all else, often pushing yourself to the absolute limit to achieve your goals. While your brilliance and determination make you a formidable force, your tendency to keep others at a distance can lead to loneliness. You often struggle with trust, preferring to work in the shadows rather than relying on a team. This guarded nature is your greatest defense but also your most significant weakness, as it can alienate the very people who want to help you. Embracing vulnerability is difficult for you, but recognizing that strength comes in many forms—including collaboration—will ultimately make you even more effective in your pursuits.

characters.name: Wonder Woman
characters.short_description: You are a courageous warrior and a compassionate diplomat who seeks to bring peace and justice to a complex world.
characters.profile_text: You embody a rare blend of fierce strength and profound empathy, making you a natural protector of the innocent. You value truth and honor above all, and you are never afraid to challenge the status quo if it means standing up for what is right. Your background has instilled in you a sense of duty and a commitment to excellence, yet you remain deeply connected to the humanity of those you serve. You excel in situations that require both tactical skill and emotional intelligence, often acting as the bridge between conflicting parties. Your primary pitfall is your occasional idealism, which can lead to disappointment when the world fails to meet your high standards of conduct. You may also find it challenging to balance your warrior spirit with your desire for peace, sometimes feeling torn between the need to fight and the urge to heal. By staying true to your core values, you remain a beacon of light for everyone you encounter.

characters.name: The Flash
characters.short_description: You are a quick-thinking and optimistic individual who approaches life with energy, humor, and a desire to help others.
characters.profile_text: You move through life at a different pace than everyone else, always looking for the next adventure or the quickest solution to a problem. Your mind is constantly racing with new ideas, and your upbeat attitude makes you a favorite among your peers. You have a knack for finding the silver lining in even the darkest situations, using your wit to defuse tension and keep spirits high. Your greatest strength is your adaptability; you can pivot in an instant when circumstances change, making you incredibly versatile in any environment. However, your speed can sometimes be your undoing, as you might overlook important details or act impulsively without considering the long-term consequences. You may struggle with patience, finding it difficult to slow down and appreciate the present moment. Learning to channel your boundless energy into focused action will help you achieve your goals without burning out or leaving others behind in your wake.

characters.name: Aquaman
characters.short_description: You are a powerful leader who commands respect through your connection to tradition and your fierce loyalty to your community.
characters.profile_text: You often find yourself caught between two worlds, giving you a unique perspective that others might lack. You are deeply protective of your heritage and your environment, and you will go to great lengths to defend those who cannot defend themselves. Your leadership style is direct and commanding, rooted in a strong sense of responsibility and a deep love for your people. You are not one for small talk or pretension; you value results and authenticity above all else. This straightforwardness is a major strength, but it can also come across as stubbornness or arrogance to those who don't know you well. Your pitfall lies in your tendency to feel like an outsider, which can lead to a defensive or solitary mindset. You might struggle with the weight of your dual identity, feeling like you don't fully belong in any one place. By embracing your unique position as a bridge between different cultures, you can find a sense of belonging and lead with even greater wisdom.

characters.name: Green Lantern
characters.short_description: You are a person of immense willpower and creativity who uses your imagination to overcome fear and protect the peace.
characters.profile_text: You believe that anything is possible if you have the courage to envision it and the will to make it real. Your greatest asset is your mental fortitude; you have the ability to stay calm and focused even when faced with your deepest fears. You are a natural problem-solver who enjoys thinking outside the box, often coming up with inventive solutions that others would never consider. You value order and justice, and you are willing to travel to the ends of the earth—or beyond—to uphold your principles. However, your reliance on your own willpower can sometimes lead to overconfidence or a refusal to admit when you are wrong. You may also struggle with the pressure of high expectations, feeling that you must always be the bravest person in the room. This can lead to internal stress that you rarely show to the outside world. By acknowledging your fears rather than just suppressing them, you can harness your true potential and inspire others to find their own inner strength.

Analyzing the situation to develop a foolproof strategy.
Standing up for what is right and protecting the innocent.
Acting quickly to resolve the issue before it escalates.
Defending my community and upholding our traditions.
Using my imagination to find a creative way to overcome the threat.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a disagreement with a peer?

options.text: I seek a resolution that maintains harmony and the greater good.
I use logic and evidence to prove my point and find the best solution.
I prioritize the truth and try to mediate a fair outcome.
I use humor to defuse the tension and move on quickly.
I am direct and straightforward about where I stand.
I look for an inventive compromise that no one else has considered.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My unwavering integrity and moral compass.
My mental discipline and self-reliance.
My empathy and commitment to justice.
My optimism and ability to adapt to any situation.
My fierce loyalty and authenticity.
My willpower and ability to face my fears.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a team environment, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The figurehead who keeps everyone motivated and focused.
The silent strategist who works behind the scenes.
The diplomat who ensures everyone's voice is heard.
The high-energy teammate who keeps the momentum going.
The protective member who looks out for the group's interests.
The innovator who provides the tools and ideas for success.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal challenges do you relate to the most?

options.text: Feeling the pressure to live up to an impossible ideal.
Struggling to trust others and keeping people at a distance.
Feeling disappointed when the world fails to meet my standards.
Overlooking important details because I am moving too fast.
Feeling like an outsider who doesn't quite fit in anywhere.
Hiding my internal stress behind a mask of confidence.

topics.display_name: Which character from Friends are you?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic 'Friends' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you the 'mother hen' of the group or the one always cracking jokes at the wrong time? Whether you're obsessed with cleanliness or just looking for your lobster, this quiz will reveal your true Central Perk identity. Grab a coffee and find out if you're more of a fashionista, a paleontologist, or a struggling actor.

characters.name: Monica Geller
characters.short_description: You are the organized, competitive, and nurturing glue that keeps the group together through your love of hosting and cleanliness.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate perfectionist who thrives on order, cleanliness, and being the best at everything you do. Whether you are scrubbing a floor or planning a dinner party, you put your heart and soul into the details, ensuring that everyone around you is well-fed and comfortable. Your competitive streak is legendary, and while it can sometimes intimidate others, it stems from a deep-seated desire to succeed and provide a stable foundation for your loved ones. You take pride in your role as the hostess and the person everyone can count on in a crisis. However, your need for control can lead to stress when things do not go exactly as planned. Learning to let go of the small stuff is your biggest challenge, but your loyalty and warmth make you the indispensable heart of your social circle. You show your love through service and high standards, always pushing yourself and those you care about to be their absolute best.

characters.name: Chandler Bing
characters.short_description: You are the witty, sarcastic, and deeply loyal friend who uses humor as a defense mechanism while navigating life's insecurities.
characters.profile_text: You are the master of the quick-witted comeback and the self-deprecating joke, often using your sharp sense of humor to mask your own vulnerabilities. While you might struggle with commitment or social awkwardness at times, your heart is gold, and you are fiercely protective of the people you love. You tend to overthink situations and can be a bit cynical, but this is usually just a shield for your sensitive nature. In your career and personal life, you value stability even if you complain about the monotony of the daily grind. Your journey is one of growth, moving from a place of fear and sarcasm toward genuine emotional maturity and deep connection. You are the friend who can always be counted on for a laugh, even in the most uncomfortable situations. Beneath the jokes lies a person who craves acceptance and is willing to go to great lengths to make a relationship work once you finally let your guard down.

characters.name: Rachel Green
characters.short_description: You are the stylish, ambitious, and resilient individual who transformed from a sheltered socialite into a successful, independent professional.
characters.profile_text: You have undergone a massive transformation, proving that you are far more than just a pretty face or a privileged background. You possess a natural flair for fashion and a keen eye for trends, but your true strength lies in your determination to make it on your own. Starting from scratch was terrifying, yet you navigated the challenges of the working world with grace and a surprising amount of grit. You are social, charming, and often the center of attention, but you also have a soft side that makes you a compassionate friend and a devoted parent. Sometimes your past insecurities or a tendency to be a bit self-centered can trip you up, but you always find a way to bounce back and learn from your mistakes. You value your independence and your career achievements, yet you never lose sight of the importance of romance and family. Your evolution is a testament to the power of reinvention and the courage it takes to walk away from a comfortable life to find your true self.

characters.name: Ross Geller
characters.short_description: You are the intelligent, romantic, and occasionally pedantic academic who values tradition and long-term commitment above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of intellect and deep passion, often finding yourself caught between your logical mind and your impulsive heart. As someone who values education and history, you can sometimes come across as a bit of a know-it-all, but this usually comes from a genuine enthusiasm for sharing knowledge. You are a hopeless romantic who believes in the concept of the one, which sometimes leads you into complicated relationship dramas or multiple marriages. Your dedication to your work and your family is unwavering, and you take your responsibilities very seriously. However, your stubbornness and need to be right can create friction in your social life. You are prone to over-analyzing every detail of a situation, which can lead to unnecessary stress or hilarious misunderstandings. Despite your occasional social blunders, you are a kind-hearted soul who would do anything for your friends and family. You seek a life of stability and meaningful connection, even if the path to getting there is filled with pivots and unexpected turns.

characters.name: Phoebe Buffay
characters.short_description: You are the eccentric, spiritual, and fiercely independent free spirit who marches to the beat of your own drum.
characters.profile_text: You are a unique individual with a colorful past and an even more vibrant personality, never afraid to speak your mind or share your unconventional beliefs. Your worldview is shaped by a mix of street-smart resilience and a whimsical, almost childlike wonder at the universe. You are deeply creative, whether you are writing quirky songs or exploring alternative therapies, and you refuse to conform to societal norms. Your loyalty to your friends is unmatched, and you often act as the group's moral compass, albeit in your own peculiar way. While you can be blunt and even a bit mysterious about your history, your intentions are almost always rooted in kindness and a desire for justice. You have a strong sense of self and are not easily swayed by the opinions of others, which makes you a refreshing presence in any room. Your life is a tapestry of strange experiences and heartfelt moments, proving that you do not need a traditional path to find happiness and fulfillment. You embrace the weirdness of life with open arms and a guitar in hand.

characters.name: Joey Tribbiani
characters.short_description: You are the charming, food-loving, and incredibly loyal actor who values simple pleasures and the bonds of friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of simple tastes and a huge heart, known for your infectious charisma and your unwavering devotion to your friends. While you might not always be the quickest person in the room to catch a joke, your emotional intelligence and intuition when it comes to the people you care about are top-notch. You live life in the moment, pursuing your dreams in the acting world with a never give up attitude, even when faced with constant rejection. Your love for food—especially pizza and sandwiches—is legendary, and you are famously protective of your plate. You have a natural ability to make people feel comfortable and liked, often using your signature catchphrases to break the ice. Though you might appear to be a carefree bachelor, you are actually the most reliable friend anyone could ask for, always ready with a hug or a place to stay. You do not overcomplicate things; for you, life is about good food, good friends, and staying true to yourself. Your innocence and warmth make you the soul of your social circle, reminding everyone to enjoy the little things.

I give them a big hug and offer to share my favorite snack.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a high-stakes, competitive situation?

options.text: I play to win at all costs; losing is simply not an option for me.
I make jokes to hide how nervous I actually am about the outcome.
I stay focused on my personal growth and how I present myself.
I rely on my expertise and get frustrated if the rules aren't followed.
I don't care about winning; I'm just there for the experience.
I'm a loyal team player who just wants everyone to have a good time.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your ideal career path?

options.text: Managing a fast-paced environment where I can maintain high standards.
A stable corporate job, even if I complain about the data processing.
Climbing the ladder in a creative, trend-setting industry like fashion.
A specialized academic or scientific role where I am an authority.
A freelance or artistic life that allows me to be my eccentric self.
Pursuing a dream in the performing arts, regardless of the setbacks.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest pet peeve in a social setting?

Awkward silences that I feel forced to fill with a joke.

When someone is factually incorrect and refuses to be corrected.
People who are too 'normal' or judgmental of unconventional ideas.
When someone tries to take food off my plate without asking.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you approach romantic relationships?

options.text: I am the caretaker who wants a partner as organized as I am.
I am often hesitant to commit and use humor to deflect intimacy.
I've evolved from wanting a 'type' to seeking a real, independent partner.
I am a hopeless romantic who believes in 'the one' and destiny.
I am fiercely independent and need a partner who accepts my quirks.
I am a charming flirt who is incredibly loyal once I truly fall in love.

topics.display_name: Which element would you bend in the Avatar world?

synopsis.title: Which Element Would You Bend In The Avatar Universe?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you're more of a fiery spirit or a grounded soul? From the frozen tundras of the Water Tribe to the bustling streets of the Earth Kingdom, your personality holds the key to your bending potential. Take this quiz to discover which of the four elements flows through your veins and where you truly belong in the world of Avatar!

characters.name: Water
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and empathetic soul who flows with the changing tides of life while maintaining a deep connection to your community.
characters.profile_text: You possess a remarkable ability to adapt to any situation, much like the element you command. Your strength lies in your fluidity and your understanding of the interconnectedness of all things. You are likely the emotional anchor for those around you, offering healing and support when others are in need. You value tradition and family, finding power in the collective rather than just the individual. However, your deep emotional well can sometimes lead to moodiness or a tendency to hold onto past hurts longer than necessary. In conflict, you prefer to turn an opponent's energy against them rather than meeting force with force. You are resourceful and can find solutions in the most unlikely places, turning even a disadvantage into a strength. Your greatest challenge is learning to let go of the things you cannot change, ensuring that your desire to protect doesn't turn into a need to control. By embracing the natural cycles of life, you find a balance between your gentle nature and your formidable inner power.

characters.name: Earth
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast and resilient individual who values stability, hard work, and the direct approach to solving problems.
characters.profile_text: You are the bedrock of your social circle, known for your unwavering reliability and your grounded perspective. You don't shy away from hard work; in fact, you thrive when you have a clear goal and a solid foundation to build upon. Your approach to life is direct and honest, as you prefer to face challenges head-on rather than dancing around them. You possess an incredible amount of patience, willing to wait for the perfect moment to strike or make a move, ensuring that when you do act, it is with maximum impact. While your strength is undeniable, your stubbornness can sometimes be your downfall. You might find it difficult to change course once you have set your mind on something, even if the situation demands flexibility. You value tangible results and physical reality over abstract concepts, which makes you exceptionally practical but occasionally closed off to new ideas. By learning to incorporate a bit of softness into your rigid exterior, you can become an unstoppable force that is both enduring and supportive.

characters.name: Fire
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and driven leader fueled by an internal flame of ambition, creativity, and intense willpower.
characters.profile_text: You carry an intense energy that draws others to you, characterized by a fierce determination to achieve your goals. Your drive is not just about power, but about the spark of life and the desire to create change in the world. You are likely highly competitive and thrive in high-pressure environments where your quick thinking and decisive actions can shine. For you, life is meant to be lived with intensity, and you bring a sense of purpose to everything you do, from your career to your personal relationships. However, that same fire can consume you if it isn't properly channeled. You may struggle with a quick temper or an impulsive nature that leads you to act before considering the consequences. Your desire for success can sometimes border on obsession, making it hard for you to find peace in the present moment. To truly master your element, you must learn that true power comes from self-control and breath, not just raw aggression. When you balance your ambition with compassion, your light can guide others rather than burning them.

characters.name: Air
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited and intellectual explorer who seeks harmony, detachment from worldly burdens, and a higher perspective on existence.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a sense of lightness and curiosity, always seeking to understand the world from a broader viewpoint. You value your freedom above all else and are often found exploring new ideas or traveling to distant places. Your peaceful nature makes you a natural mediator, as you prefer to avoid conflict and find the path of least resistance. You are likely highly imaginative and find joy in the simple wonders of the world, maintaining a sense of playfulness even in adulthood. Your greatest strength is your ability to see all sides of an issue, but this can also lead to indecisiveness or a sense of detachment from reality. You might find it difficult to commit to one path or to deal with the heavy, mundane responsibilities of everyday life. Sometimes, your desire to remain unburdened can come across as flighty or unreliable to those who depend on you. By grounding your lofty ideals in practical action, you can use your unique perspective to bring about genuine peace and enlightenment for yourself and those around you.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, unexpected obstacle, what is your primary instinctual reaction?

options.text: I stand my ground and push through it with sheer force of will.
I pivot quickly and find a way to go around or over it.
I adapt my strategy to use the obstacle's momentum to my advantage.
I confront it with intense energy and decisive, immediate action.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these values do you consider to be your greatest personal strength?

options.text: Steadfast loyalty and reliability.
Empathy and emotional intelligence.
Ambition and the drive to succeed.
Intellectual curiosity and a sense of freedom.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, what role do you naturally tend to occupy?

options.text: The foundation who keeps everyone grounded and organized.
The peacemaker who ensures everyone feels heard and supported.
The visionary leader who pushes the group toward a goal.
The independent thinker who offers a unique, detached perspective.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process and express your emotions?

options.text: I keep them contained and steady, focusing on the task at hand.
I let them flow naturally, often feeling them very deeply.
I channel them into passionate action or creative expression.
I observe them with detachment, seeking to understand the 'why' behind them.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a period of rest and reflection?

options.text: Engaging in a physical activity that yields a tangible result.
Spending quality time with loved ones in a familiar environment.
Focusing on self-improvement or planning my next big move.
Exploring a new place or meditating on abstract ideas.

topics.display_name: Which Winnie the Pooh character are you?

synopsis.title: Which Winnie the Pooh Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Take a nostalgic trip to the Hundred Acre Wood to discover which of A.A. Milne's iconic friends matches your soul. Whether you are searching for honey, bouncing with joy, or just looking for your lost tail, there is a character that perfectly captures your essence. Answer these whimsical questions to find out if you are a thoughtful leader, a loyal companion, or a cheerful optimist.

characters.name: Winnie the Pooh
characters.short_description: You are a gentle, honey-loving soul who finds joy in life's simplest pleasures and the company of dear friends.
characters.profile_text: You approach the world with a bear of very little brain philosophy, which actually masks a profound, intuitive wisdom. You don't overcomplicate things, preferring to follow your heart and often your stomach toward whatever brings comfort and peace. Your kindness is your greatest strength, as you are always ready to offer a helping hand or a thoughtful word to anyone in need, even if you get a bit distracted by a buzzing bee or a pot of honey along the way. Your presence is calming and grounding for those around you. However, your easygoing nature can sometimes lead to a lack of focus or a tendency to drift through responsibilities. You might find yourself stuck in tight spots because you didn't plan ahead, but your optimistic spirit ensures you never stay stuck for long. You value loyalty above all else, believing that a day spent with friends is the best kind of day there is.

characters.name: Piglet
characters.short_description: You are a small but incredibly brave individual who possesses a heart much larger than your stature suggests.
characters.profile_text: You are deeply sensitive and often find yourself overwhelmed by the vastness of the world, leading to moments of hesitation or worry. Despite your many fears, you possess a quiet, steadfast courage that shines through when your friends are in trouble. You are the type of person who notices the small details that others miss, making you a thoughtful and considerate companion who always knows how to make someone feel special. Your humility is endearing, though it sometimes prevents you from seeing your own worth. You tend to be cautious and may need a little extra encouragement to step out of your comfort zone. While you might startle at loud noises or big changes, your devotion to those you love is unwavering. You prove that being brave isn't about the absence of fear, but about moving forward despite it, making you an essential and beloved part of any group.

characters.name: Tigger
characters.short_description: You are an exuberant, high-energy spirit who brings a sense of fun and boundless enthusiasm to every situation.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your bounciness and an irrepressible zest for life that can turn even the most mundane afternoon into an adventure. Your confidence is infectious, and you have a unique ability to see the bright side of any circumstance, often leaping before you look. You thrive on excitement and novelty, always eager to try something new, even if you quickly discover that it isn't exactly what Tiggers do best. Your energy can be a bit overwhelming for more reserved types, but your intentions are always pure and filled with joy. Your main challenge lies in your impulsivity and a tendency to accidentally cause a bit of chaos in your wake. You may struggle with boundaries or listening to the more cautious advice of others, as you are often too busy enjoying the moment. Beneath all that bouncing, however, lies a fiercely loyal friend who would do anything to make someone smile. You remind everyone that life is meant to be lived with gusto.

characters.name: Eeyore
characters.short_description: You are a realistic and contemplative individual who appreciates the quiet moments and values genuine, steady companionship.
characters.profile_text: You tend to view the world through a lens of quiet melancholy, but this doesn't mean you lack a sense of humor or a deep capacity for love. You are the realist of the group, often pointing out the clouds in the sky, yet you remain remarkably resilient in the face of life's little disappointments. You don't expect much from the world, which allows you to be genuinely touched by small gestures of kindness, like a birthday gift or a rebuilt house of sticks. Your patience is one of your greatest virtues, as you are willing to wait out the rain and stay by a friend's side through their darkest hours. You may struggle with a tendency toward pessimism, which can sometimes make it hard for others to cheer you up. You might feel overlooked at times, but your presence provides a necessary balance to the more frantic energy of those around you. You understand that it is okay not to be okay, and your authenticity is a rare and valuable gift to those who truly know you.

characters.name: Rabbit
characters.short_description: You are a practical, organized, and hardworking leader who takes pride in maintaining order and efficiency in your environment.
characters.profile_text: You are the one who keeps things running smoothly, whether it is tending to a garden or planning a complex expedition. You value structure and rules, believing that everything has its proper place and that hard work is the key to success. Your intelligence and capability make you a natural authority figure, and you are often the person others turn to when they need a problem solved or a plan executed. You find great satisfaction in a job well done and the security of a well-stocked pantry. However, your desire for control can lead to frustration when things don't go according to your meticulous plans. You may come across as fussy or irritable when your routine is disrupted, and you can be a bit stubborn when it comes to admitting you might be wrong. Learning to embrace a bit of spontaneity and accepting the help of others can be a challenge for you. Despite your occasional grumpiness, you are deeply dependable and care deeply about the well-being of your community.

characters.name: Owl
characters.short_description: You are a knowledgeable and articulate intellectual who enjoys sharing your wisdom and stories with anyone willing to listen.
characters.profile_text: You are often regarded as the most learned member of your circle, possessing a vast library of anecdotes and a vocabulary that commands respect. You take great pride in your intellect and your family history, often drawing on past experiences to provide guidance to your friends. You are the person people seek out when they need an explanation or a formal document written, and you enjoy the status that comes with being the resident expert. Your confidence in your own abilities is high, which allows you to navigate complex situations with a sense of authority. Your pitfall is a tendency toward long-windedness and a touch of pomposity; you might talk over others or offer advice that is more impressive than it is practical. Sometimes your wisdom is a bit more muddled than you would like to admit, but your heart is in the right place. You truly want to help others navigate the world through knowledge. You provide a sense of tradition and continuity that helps ground your social circle.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new and unexpected challenge?

options.text: I dive in headfirst with excitement and energy.
I carefully organize a plan to ensure everything is handled efficiently.
I consult my past experiences and knowledge to find a logical solution.
I feel a bit nervous but try my best to help my friends through it.
I take it as it comes, usually following my intuition or my appetite.
I expect things might go wrong, so I just wait for it to pass.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a sunny afternoon in the woods?

options.text: Tending to my garden or finishing my to-do list.
Sharing a snack and a quiet moment with a close friend.
Bouncing around and looking for a new adventure.
Finding a quiet, shady spot to sit and think by myself.
Telling stories and sharing interesting facts with others.
Helping a friend with a small task, even if it feels a bit scary.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My boundless optimism and sense of fun.
My ability to stay calm and find joy in simple things.
My intelligence and the wisdom I can offer others.
My reliability and talent for keeping things in order.
My quiet resilience and realistic outlook on life.
My hidden bravery and consideration for others' feelings.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a friend is feeling down, how do you usually react?

options.text: I offer practical advice and help them get back on track.
I try to cheer them up with high-energy activities and jokes.
I sit with them quietly so they know they aren't alone in the rain.
I bring them a small treat or a comforting word.
I give them a long, detailed explanation of why things will be okay.
I stay by their side, even if I'm shaking a little bit myself.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest personal hurdle when working in a group?

options.text: I can be a bit too bossy or set in my ways.
I sometimes get distracted by my own thoughts or cravings.
I might talk too much or sound a bit condescending.
I can be accidentally overwhelming or impulsive.
I tend to be too pessimistic or slow to join in.
I often worry too much about what could go wrong.

topics.display_name: Which Bikini Bottom resident are you?

synopsis.title: Which Bikini Bottom Resident Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your personality is more 'optimistic fry cook' or 'cynical clarinetist'? Dive into the deep blue sea to discover which iconic citizen of Bikini Bottom truly matches your vibe. From karate-chopping squirrels to money-hungry crustaceans, it is time to find your underwater alter ego!

characters.name: SpongeBob SquarePants
characters.short_description: You are an eternal optimist who finds joy in the simplest tasks and values friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You approach every day with a level of enthusiasm that others might find exhausting, but your genuine kindness is your greatest strength. Whether you are flipping burgers or hanging out with friends, you put your whole heart into everything you do. You believe that everyone has good in them, and you are always the first to offer a helping hand or a cheerful laugh to brighten someone's day. Your energy is infectious, making you the heart of any social group you inhabit.

However, your eagerness to please can sometimes lead you to be overly naive or easily manipulated by those with less pure intentions. You might struggle to set boundaries, often taking on more than you can handle because you hate to say no. Despite these pitfalls, your resilience and unwavering positivity ensure that you always bounce back from setbacks with a smile on your face. You remind everyone that a little bit of imagination and a lot of heart can solve almost any problem.

characters.name: Patrick Star
characters.short_description: You are a laid-back soul who prioritizes relaxation and loyalty, often finding wisdom in the most unexpected places.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rare ability to live entirely in the moment, unburdened by the stresses and complexities that plague everyone else. Your life is defined by a deep sense of contentment and a commitment to doing absolutely nothing whenever possible. While others are racing to get ahead, you are perfectly happy observing the world from the comfort of your own space, valuing a good nap and a snack over professional accolades. Your loyalty to your friends is absolute, and you provide a steady, if sometimes confusing, presence in their lives.

Your main challenge is a tendency toward obliviousness, which can lead to misunderstandings or accidental trouble. You might lack direction or ambition, which can frustrate those who operate at a faster pace. However, your unique perspective often allows you to see simple truths that others overlook because they are too busy overthinking. You remind everyone that sometimes the best thing to do is just be yourself, slow down, and enjoy the ride without worrying about the destination.

characters.name: Squidward Tentacles
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated individual with a refined taste for the arts who often feels misunderstood by a chaotic world.
characters.profile_text:
You value culture, peace, and personal space, often finding yourself at odds with the noisy and exuberant people around you. Your creative pursuits, whether they involve music, painting, or dance, are central to your identity, even if the world doesn't always appreciate your genius. You have high standards for yourself and others, which can sometimes manifest as cynicism or a grumpy exterior. Deep down, you just want to be recognized for your talents and live a life of quiet dignity and artistic fulfillment.

Your biggest pitfall is your tendency to dwell on your frustrations and let bitterness cloud your interactions. You often feel like you are stuck in a situation that is beneath you, which can prevent you from finding joy in the present moment. You may struggle to connect with others because you fear their judgment or find their interests trivial. However, your dedication to your craft and your refusal to compromise your aesthetic values make you a truly unique and principled individual who adds much-needed class to your environment.

characters.name: Mr. Krabs
characters.short_description: You are a shrewd entrepreneur driven by a desire for financial security and a protective instinct for your hard-earned success.
characters.profile_text:
You have a sharp mind for business and an uncanny ability to spot an opportunity for profit where others see nothing. Your work ethic is unmatched, and you take immense pride in the empire you have built from the ground up. You are a natural leader who knows how to motivate a team, even if your methods are sometimes a bit frugal. To you, every penny counts, and you are fiercely protective of your assets and your loved ones, viewing your success as a shield against the world.

This intense focus on wealth can sometimes lead you to be perceived as greedy or insensitive to the needs of others. You might find it difficult to relax or spend money on yourself, as you are always worried about the bottom line and the next potential loss. Your competitive nature can occasionally alienate those who value emotional connection over material gain. Despite this, your resourcefulness and determination ensure that you are always prepared for a rainy day. You are the backbone of your community, providing stability and employment through sheer force of will.

characters.name: Sandy Cheeks
characters.short_description: You are a high-achieving polymath who combines scientific curiosity with physical prowess and a competitive spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You are never one to back down from a challenge, whether it involves a complex physics equation or a high-stakes physical competition. Your thirst for knowledge is matched only by your love for adventure, and you are constantly pushing the boundaries of what is possible. You take great pride in your heritage and your personal accomplishments, often serving as a role model for those around you. You are fiercely independent and capable, preferring to solve your own problems through logic, grit, and a bit of elbow grease.

Your competitive nature is a double-edged sword; while it drives you to excel, it can also make you come across as intimidating or stubborn.
