You might hold onto past grudges longer than necessary, fueled by a pride that demands respect and equality in all your dealings. However, your loyalty is absolute once it has been earned, and you are willing to risk everything for the people who have proven they are worthy of your trust. You are a survivor who knows your worth and won't let anyone tell you otherwise.

characters.name: Sallah
characters.short_description: You are a loyal, jovial, and resourceful ally whose deep knowledge and vast connections make you the ultimate best friend.
characters.profile_text: You are the heart of your social circle, known for your booming voice, your love of song, and your unwavering devotion to your family and friends. Your strength lies in your ability to navigate complex social landscapes and provide essential support when the stakes are highest. You are a person of great faith and tradition, often serving as the moral anchor for those around you who might be tempted by greed or ambition. Your generous nature can sometimes lead you to take on more than you can handle, putting yourself and your loved ones at risk for the sake of a cause you believe in. You tend to see the best in people, which can occasionally blind you to the immediate dangers of a situation until they are right in front of you. Nevertheless, your resourcefulness and your ability to find a way through any obstacle make you an indispensable partner in any grand adventure. You are the kind of friend who will dig through the desert or face down an army to ensure the safety of those you love.

characters.name: Henry Jones Sr.
characters.short_description: You are a dedicated scholar and a man of deep conviction who values the pursuit of knowledge and spiritual truth above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of deep intellect and discipline, often found lost in your research or contemplating the deeper mysteries of the world. You believe that the pen is mightier than the sword and that true discovery requires patience, study, and a profound respect for the divine. While you may seem distant or overly critical to those who don't know you well, your high standards are born from a desire to see others reach their full potential and honor the legacy of the past. Your obsession with your work can lead you to neglect the emotional needs of those closest to you, creating a rift that takes years of effort to heal. You can be rigid in your ways, finding it difficult to adapt to the chaotic and often violent methods of the modern world. Yet, when pushed into a corner, you show a surprising amount of courage and a dry sense of humor that reveals a warmer, more paternal side hidden beneath your scholarly robes. You are a seeker of truth who understands that the greatest treasures are not always made of gold.

characters.name: Short Round
characters.short_description: You are a brave, street-smart, and incredibly loyal companion who proves that great heroes can come in small packages.
characters.profile_text: You are quick on your feet and even quicker with a joke, using your agility and resourcefulness to survive in a world that often overlooks you. You have a knack for getting out of tight spots and a fierce protective streak for the people you consider your chosen family. Your optimism and energy are infectious, providing a much-needed spark of hope even in the darkest of circumstances, and you are never afraid to speak your mind when you see something wrong. Your youthful impulsiveness can sometimes lead you into danger before you’ve fully assessed the risks, requiring others to step in and help you out. You might struggle with feelings of being underestimated due to your age or size, which drives you to take unnecessary risks to prove your worth to the team. Despite these tendencies, your heart is pure, and your dedication to your friends makes you a vital member of any group. You are a reminder that bravery isn't about how big you are, but about how much you are willing to do for others.

characters.name: Willie Scott
characters.short_description: You are a glamorous and high-spirited performer who, despite your preference for luxury, shows surprising resilience when thrust into danger.
characters.profile_text: You are someone who appreciates the finer things in life and isn't afraid to voice your discomfort when things get messy, dangerous, or just plain dirty. While you might initially seem out of place in a rugged adventure, your ability to adapt—even if it’s with a scream—shows a hidden layer of survival instinct that keeps you going. You bring a sense of style and raw emotion to every situation, reminding those around you that there is more to life than just dusty relics and ancient curses. Your tendency to focus on your own comfort can make you appear self-centered or high-maintenance to those with more stoic or rugged personalities. You may struggle with intense anxiety when faced with the unknown, often reacting with vocal distress that can test the patience of your companions. However, when the chips are down and your friends are in trouble, you find the strength to keep moving forward and do what needs to be done. You prove that even someone who loves the spotlight can find their footing in the shadows of a dangerous quest.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, life-threatening obstacle, what is your immediate instinct?

options.text: Analyze the situation and look for a logical or historical solution.
Jump into action and improvise a way out using whatever is at hand.
Stand your ground and fight back with everything you've got.
Use your agility and quick wits to find a clever escape route.
Express your distress loudly while trying to adapt to the chaos.
Rely on your faith and the support of those around you to find a path.

baseline_questions.question_text: What primarily drives you to pursue a difficult goal or a long journey?

options.text: The pursuit of absolute truth and spiritual enlightenment.
The desire to ensure that important treasures are protected and respected.
Proving your independence and ability to survive on your own terms.
Loyalty to your friends and the need to protect your chosen family.
A sense of duty to your community and the people you love.
The promise of a better life, personal comfort, or recognition.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The mentor who provides wisdom and sets high standards.
The rugged leader who takes the brunt of the physical work.
The fierce equal who won't let anyone push them around.
The energetic helper who keeps everyone’s spirits up.
The social glue who connects people and provides essential resources.
The vibrant personality who adds flair and demands attention.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to spend your time when you aren't in the middle of an adventure?

options.text: Immersed in books, research, or quiet contemplation.
Tinkering with tools or preparing for the next big task.
Managing your own business or handling practical, everyday affairs.
Exploring the local area and looking for small excitements.
Hosting friends and family with music, food, and stories.
Enjoying the finer things in life, like fashion or entertainment.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest personal strength when things get tough?

options.text: Unwavering discipline and a deep well of specialized knowledge.
A dry sense of humor and the ability to keep going despite the pain.
Raw resilience and a refusal to be intimidated by anyone.
Pure optimism and a heart that never gives up on others.
A generous spirit and the ability to navigate any social barrier.
An unexpected survival instinct that kicks in when it matters most.

topics.display_name: Which iconic horror slasher are you?

synopsis.title: Which Legendary Horror Slasher Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your silent treatment is more Michael Myers or if your wit is as sharp as Ghostface's blade? This quiz dives deep into your survival instincts and dark sense of humor to find your cinematic match. Whether you prefer a dreamscape or a summer camp, your true slasher identity is waiting to be revealed.

characters.name: Michael Myers
characters.short_description: You are the embodiment of pure, silent evil, characterized by an unwavering and stoic persistence.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of few words, preferring to let your actions and your presence speak for you. You possess an uncanny ability to remain calm and focused, moving with a deliberate pace that somehow always keeps you one step ahead of those around you. Your strength lies in your patience and your absolute lack of hesitation; once you have set your sights on a goal, nothing can deter you from your path. You are often seen as an enigma, a blank slate that others project their fears onto, which only adds to your intimidating aura.

However, your rigid adherence to routine and your lack of emotional expression can make it difficult for others to connect with you on a human level. You might find yourself isolated by your own intensity, trapped in a cycle of your own making. While your resilience is legendary, your refusal to adapt or communicate can lead to predictable patterns that a clever adversary might eventually exploit. You are a force of nature that demands respect, but your silence is often your most isolating trait.

characters.name: Ghostface
characters.short_description: You are a theatrical and manipulative mastermind who uses psychological games and pop culture knowledge to stay ahead.
characters.profile_text:
You thrive on the thrill of the chase and the complexity of a well-laid plan. You are likely a fan of the arts, particularly cinema, and you enjoy using your extensive knowledge to subvert expectations and keep everyone guessing. Your greatest strength is your ability to blend in and manipulate social dynamics, often hiding in plain sight while orchestrating events from behind the scenes. You are quick-witted and communicative, using every tool at your disposal—from technology to psychological warfare—to achieve your ends.

Your desire for recognition and your tendency to get caught up in the drama of your own performance can be your undoing. You might become overconfident in your cleverness, leading you to take unnecessary risks just for the sake of a dramatic reveal. Because you often rely on others to help execute your vision, your success is frequently tied to the loyalty of your associates, which can be a volatile and dangerous foundation. You are a modern strategist, but your need for an audience can sometimes reveal your position.

characters.name: Freddy Krueger
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and sadistic dream-weaver who exploits the deepest fears of others with dark humor and creativity.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a wicked sense of humor and a flair for the dramatic, making you one of the most memorable personalities in any room. You don't just want to succeed; you want to leave a lasting impression, often through inventive and personalized methods that target the specific vulnerabilities of your rivals. Your strength lies in your imagination and your ability to strike when others are at their most vulnerable, turning their own thoughts against them. You are a natural showman who enjoys the psychological aspect of competition as much as the victory itself.

Your arrogance and your need to gloat can often give your opponents the opening they need to fight back. You tend to underestimate the willpower of those you target, believing your control over the environment is absolute. This overconfidence, combined with your reliance on specific conditions to exert your power, means that if you are forced to play by someone else's rules, you may find yourself unexpectedly outmatched. You are a master of the mind, but your ego is your greatest vulnerability.

characters.name: Jason Voorhees
characters.short_description: You are a relentless and physically imposing force of nature driven by a deep sense of loyalty and past trauma.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of immense physical presence and quiet intensity, often motivated by a strong, if somewhat distorted, sense of duty or family loyalty. You don't care for complex schemes or witty banter; you prefer a direct approach, using your sheer strength and durability to overcome any obstacle in your way. You are incredibly resourceful, able to turn almost any environment or tool to your advantage. Your focus is singular and your endurance is unmatched, making you a formidable opponent who simply refuses to stay down.

Your actions are often governed by deep-seated emotional wounds, which can make you reactive rather than proactive. You may struggle with complex social situations or environments that require subtlety, as your instinct is always to push forward with brute force. This lack of flexibility and your tendency to be driven by external influences or memories can leave you vulnerable to those who understand how to manipulate your history or your emotions. You are a protector at heart, but your methods are often misunderstood.

characters.name: Leatherface
characters.short_description: You are a misunderstood and family-oriented individual who expresses yourself through craftsmanship and intense devotion.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who finds comfort in tradition and the familiar bonds of home, even if those traditions are seen as unconventional by the outside world. You are a hard worker with a specific set of skills, often taking great pride in your craftsmanship and your ability to provide for those you care about. Your personality is largely shaped by the expectations of your family, and you often act as the enforcer or the protector of your inner circle. You are capable of great intensity, but this often stems from a place of fear or a desire to please those you look up to.

Your extreme dependence on your family unit can make you easily manipulated by those you trust, leading you to commit actions you might not fully understand. You often struggle with your own identity outside of your assigned role, which can lead to outbursts of frustration or confusion. Because you are so insulated from the rest of society, you may find it impossible to navigate the world on your own, leaving you trapped in a cycle of dependency and isolation. You are a loyal worker, but your world is very small.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you enter a room full of strangers, what is your natural instinct?

options.text: Stay in the shadows and observe everyone without saying a word.
Start a conversation and use your wit to influence the social dynamic.
Make a grand entrance and use humor to become the center of attention.
Keep your head down and focus solely on the task you came to perform.
Stick close to the people you know and avoid the spotlight entirely.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when pursuing a difficult long-term goal?

options.text: An internal, unwavering sense of purpose that requires no external validation.
The desire for recognition and the thrill of outsmarting the competition.
The creative satisfaction of seeing your unique, personalized vision come to life.
A deep sense of duty or a need to honor a specific person from your past.
The need to meet the expectations of your family or inner circle.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to handle a rival or an opponent?

options.text: With silent, relentless persistence until they are eventually overcome.
By playing psychological games and staying several steps ahead of them.
By finding their specific vulnerability and exploiting it with dramatic flair.
By using direct, overwhelming force to remove the obstacle immediately.
By relying on the traditional skills and tools you have mastered at home.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment makes you feel most in control of your surroundings?

options.text: A quiet, suburban neighborhood where you know every hiding spot.
A modern setting where you can use technology and information to your advantage.
A surreal or imaginative space where you can set the rules yourself.
The rugged outdoors where physical endurance and resourcefulness are key.
A private, secluded workshop or home filled with familiar traditions.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when you encounter a major setback?

options.text: You show no emotion and simply continue your pursuit without stopping.
You analyze the failure and look for a new strategy or a partner to help.
You lash out with dark humor and double down on your next creative attempt.
You become more aggressive and use brute force to push through the pain.

topics.display_name: What is your role in a heist crew?

synopsis.title: What Is Your Role In A High-Stakes Heist Crew?
synopsis.summary: Every successful job requires a specialized set of skills and nerves of steel. Whether you are the one calling the shots from the van or the one dangling from the ceiling, your contribution is vital to the score. Take this quiz to discover which essential role you would play in a professional heist team.

characters.name: The Mastermind
characters.short_description: You are the strategic architect who designs the blueprint and coordinates every moving part of the operation.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rare combination of foresight and analytical precision, allowing you to see the entire board before a single piece is moved. While others focus on their specific tasks, you are preoccupied with the timeline, the contingencies, and the exit strategy. Your strength lies in your ability to remain calm under pressure and pivot when the unexpected occurs, ensuring that the crew stays focused on the ultimate objective. You are the one who selects the targets and assembles the talent, making you the indispensable core of the entire enterprise.

However, your tendency to over-analyze can sometimes lead to a lack of trust in your teammates' spontaneity. You prefer controlled environments and may struggle when forced to rely on factors outside your direct influence. Your success depends on your ability to delegate effectively and maintain the big-picture perspective without getting bogged down in the minutiae of execution. You are the brain of the operation, and without your guidance, the most talented crew would likely crumble under the weight of their own ambition.

characters.name: The Safecracker
characters.short_description: You are the technical specialist whose steady hands and acute hearing can bypass the most sophisticated physical security measures.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your patience and your intimate understanding of mechanical engineering. While the rest of the crew handles the distractions, you are in the zone, listening to the tumblers of a high-security vault or manipulating delicate circuitry. Your focus is unparalleled, and you take pride in the craftsmanship of your work, viewing every lock as a puzzle waiting to be solved. You possess a level of manual dexterity that few can match, allowing you to perform under the ticking clock of a security response.

Your primary pitfall is your perfectionism; you may lose track of time in your pursuit of a clean opening, which can be dangerous in high-stakes scenarios. You thrive in quiet, high-pressure environments where your tactile sensitivity is the only thing standing between the crew and the score. You are the silent heart of the operation, providing the access that makes the entire heist possible. Without your specialized skills, the most elaborate plan would end at the first locked door.

characters.name: The Wheelman
characters.short_description: You are the high-speed specialist responsible for navigating the getaway and ensuring the crew evades capture.
characters.profile_text:
You have an instinctive connection with machinery and a spatial awareness that allows you to navigate urban labyrinths at breakneck speeds. Your role begins when the alarms go off, and your ability to maintain composure while weaving through traffic or outmaneuvering pursuit vehicles is what keeps the team out of prison. You know every alleyway and shortcut in the city, treating the streets like an extension of your own nervous system. You are the one who calculates the timing of traffic lights and the physics of a perfect drift.

Your adrenaline-seeking nature makes you a natural fit for this high-stakes role, but it can also lead to unnecessary risks if you aren't careful. You prefer the driver's seat to any other position, often feeling restless when you aren't in control of the vehicle. Your reliability is the crew's insurance policy, providing the literal bridge between the crime scene and the safe house. You are the final piece of the puzzle, ensuring that the hard-earned loot actually makes it home.

characters.name: The Hacker
characters.short_description: You are the digital ghost who manipulates networks and surveillance systems to provide the crew with a technological advantage.
characters.profile_text:
You operate in the realm of code and signals, neutralizing silent alarms and looping security camera feeds before the team even steps foot on the premises. Your strengths lie in your rapid problem-solving skills and your ability to exploit vulnerabilities in complex digital infrastructures. You provide the eyes and ears for the operation, monitoring police scanners and internal communications to keep the crew one step ahead of the law. Your work is often done in the shadows, but its impact is felt in every bypassed biometric scanner.

Because you often work remotely or from a van, you may feel a sense of detachment from the physical risks your teammates face. This can lead to a communication gap if you fail to translate technical data into actionable information for the field agents. Your value is found in your invisibility; if you do your job perfectly, the security team won't even realize their systems were compromised until long after you've vanished. You are the ghost in the machine that makes the impossible look easy.

characters.name: The Grifter
characters.short_description: You are the master of social engineering who uses charm and deception to manipulate people into providing access or information.
characters.profile_text:
You understand human psychology better than anyone else on the team, using your charisma to talk your way past guards or assume a false identity to infiltrate a target. Your strength is your adaptability; you can read a room in seconds and adjust your persona to fit whatever the situation requires. You are the distraction that keeps the marks looking one way while the rest of the crew moves in the opposite direction. Your weapons are not tools or guns, but words and confidence.

The danger of your role is the thin line between the mission and your own ego. You might become too invested in the performance, potentially overstaying your welcome or taking risks to prove your persuasive prowess. You are most effective when you remain grounded in the objective, using your silver tongue to smooth over hitches in the plan and ensure that the crew remains undetected through sheer force of personality. You turn the human element, usually a liability, into your greatest asset.

characters.name: The Muscle
characters.short_description: You are the physical enforcer who provides protection and handles the heavy lifting when the situation turns volatile.
characters.profile_text:
You are the crew's primary deterrent, possessing the strength and combat proficiency necessary to manage crowds or neutralize threats quickly. Your presence alone is often enough to keep a situation from escalating, but you are more than just a blunt instrument. You have a keen sense of tactical positioning and a deep understanding of defensive maneuvers, ensuring that your teammates can focus on their tasks without fear of physical harm. You are the one who holds the line when the plan goes sideways.

Your main challenge is maintaining restraint; in a heist, the goal is usually to avoid unnecessary attention, and your skills are often a last resort. You must balance your protective instincts with the need for stealth, knowing exactly when to apply force and when to remain a silent shadow. You are the foundation of the team's physical security, the one who stands between the crew and the consequences of a plan gone wrong. Your loyalty and physical prowess provide the safety net every high-stakes operation requires.
